title: Velvety Zanzibari Chicken Pasta
description: Velvety Zanzibari Chicken Pasta is a comforting, umami-packed dish that marries poached chicken with creamy coconut-infused tagliatelle for a high-protein, low-carb dinner. Its silky sauce, accented with smoked paprika, ginger, and fresh lemon zest, provides a soothing meal perfect for a sick day in Kenya.
instructions: Heat the chicken stock, coconut cream, tomato paste, ginger, garlic, onion, paprika, and a pinch of salt in a medium saucepan until it just starts to simmer.
Add the chicken pieces, reduce heat to low, and poach for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken reaches 165°F (74°C) internally.
Remove the chicken with a slotted spoon and set aside to keep warm.
Cook the tagliatelle in a large pot of salted boiling water according to the package directions until al dente, then drain, reserving a splash of pasta water.
Return the pasta to the pot, pour in the poaching broth, and stir to create a silky sauce; add the coconut cream and poached chicken, tossing gently.
If the sauce is too thick, add a little reserved pasta water until the desired consistency is reached.
Season the dish with black pepper, additional salt to taste, lemon zest, and chopped parsley, stirring to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with extra parsley and a squeeze of lemon if desired.
